---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for this project
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. *"It's difficult to compare results across multiple motors because..."*

## Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already tried.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or motor files relevant to the feature request.
